Class: ChargingStations

bemap.ChargingStations(context, optionsopt)

new ChargingStations(context, optionsopt)

BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - ChargingStations service (v1.5) Promise-based wrapper around `POST service/chargingstation/search/1.0`. **What it does.** Fetches pools of charging stations around a coordinate, along a corridor, or inside a bounding box. The user's ACL filters the providers exposed via `bemap.AclService.getCurrentUserDetails()` — pass one of those `key` values into `request.providers`. Auth: requires `ROLE_CHARGINGSTATION` or `ROLE_EVSMARTROUTING`. Typical usage: var cs = new bemap.ChargingStations(ctx); var req = new bemap.ChargingStationSearchRequest({ providers: ['ecoMovement'], coordinate: new bemap.Coordinate(2.35, 48.85), radius: 2000, maxPoolResult: 25, options: [bemap.ChargingStationOption.PATH_POOL_MAP] }); cs.search(req).then(function(response) { response.getPools().forEach(function(pool) { addMarker(pool.getCoordinate(), pool.getName()); }); });
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context. Mandatory.
options Object <optional>
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/charging-stations/bemap-charging-stations.js, line 36

Extends

  • bemap.ServiceV2

Methods

getConnectorTypes(optionsopt) → {Promise.<Array.<Object>>}

Fetch the list of connector types known by the server. The result is the `types[]` array from `GET service/chargingstation/connector/list/1.0`.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
geoserver String <optional>
 Override the Context geoserver.
signal AbortSignal <optional>
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/charging-stations/bemap-charging-stations.js, line 90
Returns:
The raw `types[]` array from the server.
Type
Promise.<Array.<Object>>

search(request, optionsopt) → {Promise.<bemap.ChargingStationSearchResponse>}

Search for charging-station pools matching the supplied filters.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
request bemap.ChargingStationSearchRequest
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Description
signal AbortSignal <optional>
 AbortSignal for cancellation.
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/charging-stations/bemap-charging-stations.js, line 50
Returns:
Type
Promise.<bemap.ChargingStationSearchResponse>
